name: Module 1
title: Building Blocks of Quantitative Finance
topics: asset behavior, binomial models, stochastic calculus, PDEs, martingales

name: Module 2
title: Quantitative Risk & Return
topics: portfolio management, optimization, VaR, expected shortfall, volatility, Basel, collateral

name: Module 3
title: Equities & Currencies
topics: Black-Scholes, option pricing, numerical methods, exotic options, volatility, FX options

name: Module 4
title: Data Science & Machine Learning I
topics: machine learning, supervised learning, decision trees, ensembles, finance case studies

name: Module 5
title: Data Science & Machine Learning II
topics: unsupervised learning, neural networks, NLP, reinforcement learning, market prediction

name: Module 6
title: Fixed Income & Credit
topics: fixed income, interest rates, HJM, yield curves, CDS, credit models, XVA

name: Final Project
title: Final Project / Exam Prep
topics: revision, implementation, exam preparation, project write-up
